sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n15154" key="*)arkadi/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Ἀρκᾰδίζω</orth>, <sense id="n15154.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">take the side of the Arcadians,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1620.tlg001:6:36" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Polyaen.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.36</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
